Faculty of Dentistry

Dean's Message

MENU

Dean

Dear
Students,

Istanbul Okan University

Faculty of Dentistry commenced its educational activities
in the 2014–2015 academic year with the Turkish Dentistry Program and, as of
the 2017–2018 academic year, has continued to expand as a modern and innovative
institution by offering both Turkish and English Dentistry Programs.

The
primary mission of our Faculty is to educate highly competent dentists who
closely follow scientific advancements, adopt an evidence-based approach to
dentistry, uphold ethical values, and possess strong communication and empathy
skills. In line with this mission, our curriculum is designed with a
student-centered approach that integrates theoretical knowledge with clinical
practice and emphasizes continuous development.

During
the initial years of our five-year program, students receive comprehensive
education in basic medical sciences and dentistry, alongside preclinical
training aimed at developing their professional skills. This process, conducted
in fully equipped simulation and laboratory environments, prepares our students
for advanced clinical practice. Clinical training begins in the third year and
continues with hands-on patient care under the supervision of our academic
staff in state-of-the-art clinical settings. In the fifth year, students are
prepared for professional life through multidisciplinary clinical training.

Our
clinical education is carried out at the Faculty of Dentistry Hospital located
near Tuzla Campus. Equipped with modern clinical units, operating rooms, research
laboratories, and advanced imaging systems, the hospital provides a high-level
practical training environment for our students.

Our
Faculty aims not only to deliver high-quality education but also to serve as a
center where scientific research is encouraged, productivity is supported, and
academic development is prioritized. Through national and international
collaborations, our Faculty continues to enhance its scientific contributions
and has rapidly become a respected and preferred institution.

With
our experienced and dynamic academic staff, we offer an educational environment
that supports the professional, social, cultural, and scientific development of
our students. Through various activities and projects carried out within our
Faculty, students gain a strong sense of social responsibility, professional
solidarity, and multidimensional development.

We
also continue to expand in the field of postgraduate education through our
ongoing specialty programs, striving to train the academicians of the future.

We
firmly believe that our graduates will continue to make significant
contributions both nationally and internationally as competent dentists who are
well-informed about innovations in their field, committed to lifelong learning,
self-confident, ethically grounded, and patient-oriented.

In
line with the legacy of reason and science established by

Mustafa
Kemal ATATÜRK

, we take great pride in our responsibility to educate
contemporary, productive, and distinguished dentists who make a difference.

I would
like to extend my sincere thanks to all our academic and administrative staff
for their contributions to this journey of success, and I wish our students a
fruitful and successful academic life.
